channel.title: Patent on Podbharati
channel.description: Recent content in Patent on Podbharati

item.title: इंन्वेंशन और इन्नोवेशन में क्या फर्क है? कैसे लिया जाता है पेटेंट?
item.description: In this episode, motivator Ankur Warikoo warns against a mistake we often make; then we talk about Invention & Innovation and discuss the nuances of Patent from Alok Govil, Principle Engineer at Amazon, who has credits for several patents, and an interesting story of Cats & Parachutes.
